title: delphinium decorum var. genuinum
intro: Delphinium decorum var. genuinum, also known as the Delphinium or Larkspur, is a perennial plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to cause delirium and induce sleep, due to the presence of alkaloids such as delphinine and delphineine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including insomnia, anxiety, and inflammation, and has been employed in traditional medicine for its analgesic and sedative properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, have been used to alleviate symptoms of restlessness and to promote relaxation.
